name: Necroface
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck. This card gains 100 ATK for each card shuffled into the Main Deck by this effect. If this card is banished: Each player banishes 5 cards from the top of their Deck (or their entire Deck, if less than 5).
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck. This card gains 100 ATK for each card shuffled into the Main Deck by this effect. If this card is banished: Each player banishes 5 cards from the top of their Deck (or their entire Deck, if less than 5).
eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck. This card gains 100 ATK for each card shuffled into the Main Deck by this effect. If this card is banished: Each player banishes 5 cards from the top of their Deck (or their entire Deck, if less than 5).

sets.set: Duelist Pack: Rivals of the Pharaoh

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from the top of your Deck
Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
